name: BACARDÍ Coconut
short_description: BACARDÍ Coconut brings the beach to your backyard.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Coconut is a flavoured rum made from a blend of white rum and real coconut essence, designed to bring a tropical, beachy character to the glass. It has clean, mellow flavors with a smooth, easygoing feel and a distinctly coconut-forward profile, lifted by citrus and pineapple notes. Ideal for refreshing serves, it works well over ice or mixed into simple, sunny drinks. Especially suited to fruit-forward cocktails like a Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice, Rum Rita, Lime Cooler, Raspberry Mojito, or Limonade, it’s a versatile choice for coconut, tropical, citrus, and summer cocktail use.
display_description: BACARDÍ Coconut brings the beach to your backyard.
